transcript: Speaker A (AI): Hello, what is your name? Speaker B (Human): My name is Rahul. Speaker A (AI): How old are you? Speaker B (Human): I have 22. Speaker A (AI): I have 22 nahi, I am 22 years old hota hai. [Not 'I have 22', it is 'I am 22 years old'.] Speaker B (Human): Okay okay, I am 22 years old. Speaker A (AI): Where are you from? Speaker B (Human): I am Uttar Pradesh. Speaker A (AI): I am Uttar Pradesh nahi, I am from Uttar Pradesh hoga. [Not 'I am Uttar Pradesh', it should be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.] Speaker B (Human): Ohh... theek hai, theek hai. Mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Oh... okay, okay. I don't know English well.] Speaker A (AI): Koi problem nahi, AI teachers try kiya? [No problem, did you try AI teachers?] Speaker B (Human): Wo to mehnge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?] Speaker A (AI): Bilkul nahi, normal English classes se 7x cheaper hai. Isiliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all, it is 7x cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B (Human): Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] Speaker A (AI): Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaoge. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Speaker B (Human): Wow, kaise join karu? [Wow, how do I join?] Speaker A (AI): Ye install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sirf 15 dino mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. You will see improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started.] Speaker C (Voiceover): Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]

Try MySivi fast, Sirf 15 dino mein, tumhe improvement, dikhne lagegi, Chalo, shuru ho jao, MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A man with 'ME NO ENGLISH' written on his back gets real-time grammar corrections from an AI robot on a giant phone screen. The AI explains that the MySivi app is 7x cheaper than traditional classes and requires only 15-20 minutes of daily practice. The ad concludes with a call-to-action prompting viewers to install the app to see improvements in 15 days.
